title: Archive Selections: Academic Drawings
description: A curated selection of academic drawing exercises highlighting classical study methods.

title: Urban Perspectives of Riga
description: Street and square perspectives from student portfolios across several decades.

title: Interior Worlds: Perspective & Detail
description: Interior perspective drawings paired with construction detail sequences and material studies.

title: Measured Surveys & Historical Surveys
description: Documentation work supporting conservation thinking: plans, sections, and façade records.

title: Sketchbook Culture at RTU
description: Field sketches and travel notebooks showing fast observation and narrative annotation.

title: Environment Drawings: Humans in Context
description: Urban and landscape drawings with human scale cues and movement studies.

title: Technical Clarity
description: A showcase of technical drawing standards, notation systems, and detail legibility.

title: Concept to Board: Final Presentation Drawings
description: Architectural final presentation boards tracing concept development through studio iterations.

title: Archive Futures: Visualization & Research
description: Theme visualizations and research drawings linking historical material to contemporary methods.

title: Architecture Exhibition
description: An annual exhibition presenting curated archive highlights alongside new student work.
